description: Critical smoke tests for loci-preflight. Validates only invoke / no-invoke behavior and required preflight structure. Designed for cheap, deterministic grading.
note: Set $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to your local BLE project root before running.

evals.prompt: Implement a guard in ClockP_construct in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockP_freertos.c so it returns NULL immediately if clockFxn is NULL, before any timer setup occurs.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block appears before any implementation plan or code and includes all required sections: Call graph, Latency, Energy, and Execution fit.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use an allowed value

evals.prompt: How should I modify ClockP_stop in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockP_freertos.c so it returns immediately without calling the FreeRTOS timer API if the clock was never started?
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required sections appears before the modification plan.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: 'How should I modify' must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use an allowed value

evals.prompt: /plan Add a per-connection packet counter inside HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c that increments a uint32_t in the connection record on every successful send.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required sections appears as part of the plan, before any edit steps or code.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use an allowed value

evals.prompt: Explain what ClockP_start does in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockP_freertos.c and when the timer becomes active. Do not propose changes.
evals.expected_output: A plain explanation with no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: Explain-only request must not trigger the skill

evals.prompt: Explain what GAPBondMgr_Init does in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c and what each parameter controls.
evals.expected_output: A plain explanation with no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: Explain is read-only — skill must stay silent

evals.prompt: Review HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c for potential issues. Don't change anything yet — just tell me what you find.
evals.expected_output: A code review with observations and no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: 'Don't change anything yet' is explicit analysis mode — skill must stay silent
